**Determining strike announcement**

I'm looking at the content to see if it qualifies as a strike announcement. The title indicates a 24-hour strike for February 24, 2025, declared by USB. The date of the announcement is February 19, 2025. It provides guaranteed service hours and specifies that this is part of a national strike. Based on this, I should set isStrike to true and classify the location as national because it's part of a broader action involving the Naples area.
